title: berkheya chrysanthemoides
intro: Berkheya chrysanthemoides, also known as the yellow daisy or African daisy, is a flowering plant native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Berkheya chrysanthemoides include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, and it has been used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
